title: Check if a tree is a BST or not

content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Check if a tree is a BST or not". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/validate-binary-search-tree/
content.inputFormat: The input is the root of a binary tree where each node has a unique value.
content.outputFormat: A boolean indicating whether the binary tree is a valid binary search tree (BST).

solution.approach: Recursion or Iteration with In-Order Traversal
solution.spaceComplexity: O(H) where H is the height of the tree
